attributes.magic: PE32 executable (console) Intel 80386, for MS Windows

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET POLICY IP Check Domain (whatismyip in HTTP Host)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET POLICY IP Check Domain (whatismyip in HTTP Host)"; flow:established,to_server; http.method; content:"GET"; http.host; content:"whatismyip."; classtype:attempted-recon; sid:2008986; rev:8; metadata:created_at 2010_07_30, former_category POLICY, updated_at 2020_08_25;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_category: Device Retrieving External IP Address Detected
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET POLICY External IP Lookup - ip2location.com
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET POLICY External IP Lookup - ip2location.com"; flow:established,to_server; http.method; content:"GET"; http.host; content:"ip2location.com"; endswith; fast_pattern; http.header_names; content:!"Referer|0d 0a|"; classtype:external-ip-check; sid:2021162; rev:5; metadata:created_at 2015_05_29, former_category POLICY, updated_at 2020_10_01;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_category: Device Retrieving External IP Address Detected
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET POLICY Known External IP Lookup Service Domain in SNI
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET 443 (msg:"ET POLICY Known External IP Lookup Service Domain in SNI"; flow:to_server,established; tls.sni; content:"whatismyipaddress.com"; endswith; classtype:external-ip-check; sid:2026896; rev:3; metadata:affected_product Windows_XP_Vista_7_8_10_Server_32_64_Bit, attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2019_02_11, deployment Perimeter, former_category POLICY, performance_impact Low, signature_severity Major, tag IP_address_lookup_website, updated_at 2020_09_16;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET POLICY Known External IP Lookup Service Domain in SNI
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET 443 (msg:"ET POLICY Known External IP Lookup Service Domain in SNI"; flow:to_server,established; tls.sni; content:"whatismyipaddress.com"; endswith; classtype:external-ip-check; sid:2026896; rev:4; metadata:affected_product Windows_XP_Vista_7_8_10_Server_32_64_Bit, attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2019_02_11, deployment Perimeter, performance_impact Low, confidence High, signature_severity Informational, tag IP_address_lookup_website, updated_at 2024_09_19, mitre_tactic_id TA0043, mitre_tactic_name Reconnaissance, mitre_technique_id T1590, mitre_technique_name Gather_Victim_Network_Information;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_category: Device Retrieving External IP Address Detected
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO External IP Lookup Domain in DNS Lookup (whatismyipaddress .com)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET INFO External IP Lookup Domain in DNS Lookup (whatismyipaddress .com)"; dns.query; dotprefix; content:".whatismyipaddress.com"; nocase; endswith; reference:url,github.com/chubin/awesome-console-services; classtype:external-ip-check; sid:2054170; rev:1; metadata:affected_product Any, attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2024_06_28, deployment Perimeter, performance_impact Low, confidence High, signature_severity Informational, tag External_IP_Lookup, updated_at 2024_06_28, reviewed_at 2024_10_04, mitre_tactic_id TA0043, mitre_tactic_name Reconnaissance, mitre_technique_id T1590, mitre_technique_name Gather_Victim_Network_Information;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: SERVER-OTHER Squid HTTP Vary response header denial of service attempt
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp $EXTERNAL_NET $HTTP_PORTS -> $HOME_NET any ( msg:"SERVER-OTHER Squid HTTP Vary response header denial of service attempt"; flow:to_client,established; http_header; content:"Vary|3A|"; content:!"|0D 0A|",within 250; metadata:policy max-detect-ips drop; service:http; reference:cve,2016-2569; reference:url,www.squid-cache.org/Advisories/SQUID-2016_2.txt; classtype:denial-of-service; sid:41379; rev:1; )

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: (http_inspect) HTTP Content-Length message body was truncated
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert ( gid:119; sid:260; rev:1; msg:"(http_inspect) HTTP Content-Length message body was truncated"; metadata: rule-type preproc; classtype:unknown;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO DYNAMIC_DNS Query to *.dyndns. Domain
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET INFO DYNAMIC_DNS Query to *.dyndns. Domain"; dns.query; content:".dyndns."; nocase; classtype:misc-activity; sid:2012758; rev:6; metadata:created_at 2011_05_02, updated_at 2020_08_17;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: POLICY-OTHER HTTP request by IPv4 address attempt
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp any any -> any $HTTP_PORTS ( msg:"POLICY-OTHER HTTP request by IPv4 address attempt"; flow:to_server,established; http_header; content:"Host:",fast_pattern,nocase; pcre:"/^Host\x3a\s*(?:(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9]?[0-9])\.){3}(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9]?[0-9])\s*:?\s*\d*\s*$/smi"; service:http; reference:url,www.w3.org/Protocols/rfc2616/rfc2616-sec15.html; classtype:policy-violation; sid:50447; rev:1; )

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Detects aPLib decompression code often used in malware
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: @r3c0nst

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Yara rule that detects Encoded01 ransomware.
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: ReversingLabs

crowdsourced_ai_results.analysis: The sample is a malicious loader/packer designed to manually map and execute an embedded PE payload in memory. Key indicators include: 1) Presence of an RWX segment (0x401000) which is a significant indicator of self-modifying code or unpacked payload execution. 2) Manual PE loading logic in function sub_40179e, which parses MZ/PE headers, allocates memory via VirtualAlloc, performs base relocations (sub_401659), and manually resolves imports using LoadLibraryA and GetProcAddress. 3) A complex decryption/decompression routine in sub_401197 and sub_4015b0 used to prepare the hidden payload. 4) The use of VirtualQuery to find its own allocation base (sub_401782). These techniques are characteristic of sophisticated malware attempting to evade static analysis and security products.
